pr.title: Fixup ftmaterial function call, cleanup itdrop
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Small merged cleanup/fix PR touching fighter material class initialization and item drop code. ftmaterial changed the superclass argument in hsdInitClassInfo from ftMObj.parent to hsdMObj.parent. itdrop added inlines.h and replaced three direct item_gobj->user_data accesses with GET_ITEM(...) calls.

key_files.role: Fixes ftMaterial_800BF260 class initialization parent argument for ftMObj.
Cleans item data access by including inlines.h and using GET_ITEM for Item_GObj user data.

what_changed.description: In ftMaterial_800BF260, hsdInitClassInfo now passes &hsdMObj.parent as the parent class argument instead of &ftMObj.parent.
Replaced direct item_gobj->user_data assignment with GET_ITEM(item_gobj) in it_8026F3D4.
Replaced direct spawned_item_gobj->user_data assignment with GET_ITEM(spawned_item_gobj) in it_8026F6BC and it_8026F7C8.

smart_moves.description: Used an existing item accessor macro rather than repeating direct user_data member access at each call site.
Kept the ftmaterial fix narrow: only the hsdInitClassInfo parent argument changed, with no unrelated class-info reshaping in the diff.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a subsystem has a typed/accessor macro for recovering object user data, prefer that accessor over direct user_data access at item call sites.
Class initialization call arguments should identify the actual parent class object; this PR corrected ftMObj initialization to use hsdMObj.parent as the parent argument.

naming_conventions.convention: No symbol renames were introduced; existing names such as ftMObj, hsdMObj, item_gobj, spawned_item_gobj, and spawned_item were preserved.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Accessor substitution: direct GObj user_data reads in itdrop were rewritten as GET_ITEM(...) after adding inlines.h.
Narrow call-argument correction: only the second hsdInitClassInfo argument changed from &ftMObj.parent to &hsdMObj.parent.

searchable_terms: Fixup ftmaterial function call cleanup itdrop

notes: Diff and changed-file metadata are complete for the small PR slice.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use GET_ITEM instead of direct user_data access in item GObj code
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2610 replaced three Item_GObj user_data reads in src/melee/it/itdrop.c with GET_ITEM(...) and added inlines.h, aligning with the typed/accessor cleanup principle.
